summary: Iteration 63: Testimonial Template System, Global Search, and Transformations Features - FULLY WORKING. Backend: All 19 API tests passed (global search, testimonials filtering, template CRUD, categories). Frontend: Transformations page with hero, search, type tabs (All/Text Stories/Graphics/Videos), filters working. Global Search spotlight working with Programs/Sessions/Testimonials results. Admin Panel Template testimonial type with program/session tags working. Fixed navigation bug in GlobalSearch.jsx (changed /programs/:id to /program/:id and /sessions/:id to /session/:id).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: GlobalSearch.jsx had wrong routes - changed /programs/:id to /program/:id and /sessions/:id to /session/:id
Backend search.py correctly searches across programs, sessions, testimonials collections
Backend testimonials.py correctly implements program_id, session_id, type, category, search filters
Testimonial model correctly includes program_tags, session_tags, category, role, type='template' fields
TransformationsPage.jsx correctly implements type tabs filtering and filter panel with program/session dropdowns
TemplateTestimonialCard.jsx renders beautiful styled cards with quote, author name, role
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_AdminClient template testimonial during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: Global Search (search-icon-btn opens spotlight, searches programs/sessions/testimonials), Transformations Page (tab-all, tab-template, tab-graphic, tab-video, filter-toggle, filter-program, filter-session, transformations-search), Admin testimonial form (testimonial-type-select has 'template' option, shows role/location and author photo fields when template selected, program_tags and session_tags chip selectors). Fixed route bug: GlobalSearch now correctly navigates to /program/:id and /session/:id instead of pluralized routes.

global_search.click_result_navigates: PASS - Now correctly navigates to /program/:id and /session/:id
global_search.esc_closes_overlay: PASS - ESC key closes search overlay

transformations_page.type_tabs: PASS - All, Text Stories, Graphics, Videos tabs visible

admin_testimonial_form.template_shows_on_transformations: PASS - Text Stories tab shows template testimonials

backend_api.GET_search: PASS - Returns programs, sessions, testimonials structure

bug_fixed.reason: Routes defined in App.js are /program/:id and /session/:id (singular)

Admin: Tag to Programs chips work
